steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The first sentence states that ticker tape “had long since been retired by the 1986 parade”; the blank must introduce what happened instead. The relationship is cause to consequence.

steps.title: Match the consequence
steps.content:
”Then” directly signals that shredded standard paper is the consequence that follows the retirement of ticker tape.
The other three transitions either add information without showing causation, restate the previous idea, or acknowledge context without indicating consequence.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
